# Transcrição: 7. Get a 500_ Increase in Lead Conversion

- **Fonte:** 7. Get a 500_ Increase in Lead Conversion
- **Duração:** 02:05
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:05]

Imagine gaining a 500% increase in lead conversion. I can do that for you. If you would simply just follow up in the first 60 seconds after even the phone contact or the website was hit, you would have almost a 500% increase in conversion. Consider this. The first business that follows a client up has almost a 248% better chance of converting than the second or third one. Consider this. Only 37% little over one third of all companies respond within the first hour. And if that's not enough for you, there's a seven times more likely chance to have a meaningful conversation with a key decision maker if you make contact within the first hour. That was from an MIT study. Now, what am I telling you all this for? I'm telling you this because your advantage in the marketplace is not just follow up and not just nurturing, but at the speed at which you can do it. In the first 60 seconds, your chances of closing a customer increase 500 times. So if you went to your company this morning and you said, I want to increase my sales by 500%, what would you do? You would basically do one thing, increase your follow up in the first 60 seconds. There is no other thing that you could get that kind of lift than just simply following a customer up almost instantly. Probably going to have to use the cell phone, probably have to use texting or emailing to do that that fast. If you were the first business to follow the customer up after they expressed an interest, I could increase your sales or at least your chance of selling or converting this client by 248%. What is this telling you? Speed. Speed at which you can follow up is vital to your chances. The sooner you can make contact, the better your chances are in the marketplace. If you can respond within the first hour, you get 37% of the business in your market. Speed is everything with follow up. Just look at the stats. They're on your side or they're against you, but you've got to get speed on your side.
